top_signals.title: Congo Faces Surge in Ebola Cases as Key Medical Tools Run Short
top_signals.summary: Africa’s top public health official said the latest Ebola outbreak in eastern Congo is being fought without one of the most important tools in epidemic response: vaccines.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: NEAR token jumps 30% amid AI hype, Arthur Hayes endorsement and scaling plans
top_signals.summary: The prominent crypto investor Arthur Hayes described NEAR, HYPE and ZEC as “the holy trinity” of altcoins.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
